name: checklist-full
description: Full audit checklist — all 10 sections based on reliance-grade financial model standards (FAST + Big Four). Not active until explicitly enabled.

tier1.label: No Excel formula errors anywhere in workbook
tier1.fix_instruction: Replace error cell with 0 and flag for review

tier1.label: Required structural sheets present
tier1.fix_instruction: Cannot auto-create missing sheets — add the missing sheet manually

tier1.label: Model Issues tab is empty
tier1.fix_instruction: Resolve all items in Model Issues tab before resubmitting

tier1.label: Balance sheet check sheet exists
tier1.fix_instruction: Add balance sheet check row: Assets - Liabilities - Equity = 0

tier1.label: Cash flow reconciliation sheet exists
tier1.fix_instruction: Add cash reconciliation check: Change in BS cash = Operating + Investing + Financing CF

tier1.label: No negative PP&E values
tier1.fix_instruction: PP&E cannot be negative — review asset roll-forward

tier2.label: Model purpose matches design and outputs
tier2.description: Confirm the model's documented purpose matches its design. Key outputs should align with stated purpose (e.g. DSCR/LLCR for project finance, IRR/NPV for investment decisions, cash/EBITDA for planning). Flag if outputs do not match the stated purpose.
tier2.fix_instruction: Update cover sheet or README to document model purpose and confirm outputs align with that purpose

tier2.label: FAST principles applied — no opaque constructs
tier2.description: Formulas should be short, consistent, and transparent. Flag any formula exceeding 5 nested functions, any use of OFFSET or INDIRECT in core calculation areas, or any calculation that cannot be traced in a single step.
tier2.fix_instruction: Simplify flagged formula — break into intermediate calculation steps on a working sheet

tier2.label: No inputs hard-coded in calculation sheets
tier2.description: All business assumptions (price, volume, margin, tax rate, debt term, interest rate, capex) must be entered on Input/Assumption sheets only and referenced in calculation sheets. Any numeric constant found in a formula on a calculation or output sheet that is not a structural constant should be flagged as a critical error.
tier2.fix_instruction: Move hard-coded value to Inputs sheet and replace formula constant with a cell reference

tier2.label: No critical calculations on output sheets
tier2.description: Financial statement sheets (IFS, AFS, Cons) should contain only links to supporting schedules — not original calculations. Flag any formula on an output sheet that does not simply reference another sheet.
tier2.fix_instruction: Move calculation logic to a supporting schedule sheet and replace with a reference link on the output sheet

tier2.label: Single master timeline drives all time-series sheets
tier2.description: All time-series sheets should reference a single master timeline for start date, periodicity, and number of periods. Flag if any sheet appears to have an independent timeline that could diverge from the master.
tier2.fix_instruction: Link flagged sheet timeline to master timeline on Inputs or Timing sheet

tier2.label: No hidden sheets that affect results
tier2.description: Confirm there are no hidden or very hidden sheets containing calculations that materially affect model outputs without being visible to the reviewer.
tier2.fix_instruction: Unhide flagged sheet or document its purpose and confirm it does not affect core outputs

tier2.label: All inputs located on dedicated Input/Assumption sheets
tier2.description: Inputs should be grouped on clearly labelled Inputs or Assumptions sheets. Each input should show label, units, sign convention, and source. Flag if key assumptions appear to be entered directly on calculation sheets.
tier2.fix_instruction: Consolidate all inputs to the Inputs sheet with labels, units, and source references

tier2.label: Key assumptions entered once and referenced everywhere
tier2.description: Company name, currency, WACC, tax rate, and key dates should each appear on the Inputs sheet once and be referenced from there. Flag if the same assumption appears hard-coded in multiple locations.
tier2.fix_instruction: Centralise flagged assumption on Inputs sheet and replace all instances with a single cell reference

tier2.label: Single formula per row on all time-series
tier2.description: On time-series rows, the same formula should be copied consistently across all periods. Flag any row where the formula changes mid-row without being a clearly labelled exception line.
tier2.fix_instruction: Standardise formula across the flagged row — check for mid-row edits or anchoring inconsistencies

tier2.label: Consistent sign convention throughout workbook
tier2.description: Inflows should be consistently positive (or consistently negative) and outflows the opposite throughout the model. Check the financial statements and cash flow waterfall. Flag any line item where the sign convention appears inconsistent with surrounding items.
tier2.fix_instruction: Review sign convention on flagged line — confirm inflow/outflow direction matches workbook standard

tier2.label: No unintended circular references
tier2.description: Confirm there are no unintended circular references. Any intentional circularity (e.g. interest on cash sweeps) must be documented and converge reliably. Flag any circular reference that is not documented on the Inputs or Checks sheet.
tier2.fix_instruction: Document the circular reference on the Inputs sheet with a description of its purpose and confirm it converges

tier2.label: Balance sheet balances for every period
tier2.description: For every modelled period, Assets minus Liabilities minus Equity should equal zero within rounding tolerance of +/- 1. Flag the cell and period where any imbalance occurs.
tier2.fix_instruction: Balance sheet does not balance — review equity roll-forward, retained earnings, and debt schedules

tier2.label: Change in cash equals net cash flow for every period
tier2.description: For every period, change in balance sheet cash must equal the sum of operating, investing, and financing cash flows. Flag the period and cell where any discrepancy occurs.
tier2.fix_instruction: Cash flow does not reconcile to balance sheet — review all three CF sections for missing or double-counted items

tier2.label: Net income flows through to retained earnings
tier2.description: Opening retained earnings plus net income minus dividends equals closing retained earnings for every period. Flag any period where this identity does not hold.
tier2.fix_instruction: Retained earnings roll-forward does not reconcile — review P&L link to equity schedule

tier2.label: Equity movements reconcile between balance sheet and cash flow
tier2.description: Share issues, buybacks and other equity movements must appear consistently in both the balance sheet and financing activities section of the cash flow statement.
tier2.fix_instruction: Equity movement present in balance sheet but missing from cash flow or vice versa — review financing activities

tier2.label: Working capital movements reconcile between balance sheet and operating cash flow
tier2.description: Changes in receivables, payables, inventory and other working capital on the balance sheet must equal the corresponding movements in operating cash flow with no unexplained residual.
tier2.fix_instruction: Working capital movement mismatch — review receivables, payables and inventory links between balance sheet and CF

tier2.label: No logically impossible balance sheet positions
tier2.description: Check for negative inventory, negative gross PP&E, or negative trade receivables/payables where not explicitly modelled as credit balances.
tier2.fix_instruction: Logically impossible balance sheet value — review flagged line item and correct formula or assumption

tier2.label: Income tax calculation is reconcilable
tier2.description: Income tax expense should derive from taxable profits with a reasonable effective rate. Flag if effective rate is zero when taxable profits are positive or if the tax charge appears disconnected from the P&L.
tier2.fix_instruction: Tax calculation disconnected from taxable profits — review tax schedule and effective rate reconciliation

tier2.label: Deferred tax treatment is disclosed
tier2.description: If deferred tax balances exist on the balance sheet, they must reconcile with temporary differences. If not modelled, the simplification must be disclosed. Flag if deferred tax balances exist without reconciliation.
tier2.fix_instruction: Add deferred tax schedule or document the simplification on Inputs sheet

tier2.label: Debt roll-forward identity holds for each facility
tier2.description: For each debt facility, opening plus draws plus capitalised interest minus amortisation minus prepayments equals closing balance for every period. No negative debt balances. No amortisation beyond contractual maturity.
tier2.fix_instruction: Debt roll-forward does not balance — review draw, repayment and capitalised interest links on Debt sheet

tier2.label: Interest calculated from referenced rates — no hard-coded rates
tier2.description: Interest charges should be calculated from base rates and margins referenced from the Inputs sheet. Flag any interest formula containing a hard-coded rate.
tier2.fix_instruction: Replace hard-coded interest rate with a reference to the Inputs sheet

tier2.label: Covenant calculations follow documented definitions
tier2.description: DSCR, LLCR, ICR, leverage ratios, and gearing tests should strictly follow documented definitions. Flag if covenant calculations appear to use a different numerator or denominator than the term sheet definition.
tier2.fix_instruction: Review covenant calculation definition against term sheet — update formula to match documented definition

tier2.label: Capex phasing feeds into PP&E, balance sheet and investing cash flow
tier2.description: Capex phasing from the schedule must link correctly to PP&E on the balance sheet and to investing activities in the cash flow statement. Flag if Capex appears in one location but not the others.
tier2.fix_instruction: Capex not linked to PP&E or investing CF — review Capex schedule links to balance sheet and cash flow

tier2.label: Revenue equals price times volume
tier2.description: Revenue lines should be traceable to price and volume drivers. Flag any revenue block that cannot be reconciled to operational assumptions on the Inputs or Ops sheet.
tier2.fix_instruction: Revenue not linked to price/volume drivers — add explicit price x volume calculation referencing Inputs sheet

tier2.label: EBITDA margin is plausible
tier2.description: Gross and EBITDA margins should be plausible relative to industry norms for a mining operation (typically 10%-70%). Flag extreme values as potential assumption errors.
tier2.fix_instruction: Review EBITDA margin assumptions on Inputs sheet — confirm against industry benchmarks

tier2.label: IRR and NPV are within plausible range
tier2.description: Project and equity IRRs should be within ranges consistent with mining project risk (typically 8%-40% for project IRR). NPVs should be positive at the discount rate used. Flag extreme outliers as potential errors.
tier2.fix_instruction: IRR or NPV appears outside plausible range — review discount rate assumption and cash flow profile

tier2.label: Scenario engine is centrally controlled
tier2.description: Scenario selection should be controlled by a single cell or switch on the Inputs or Dashboard sheet that drives all scenario-dependent assumptions. Flag if scenario inputs appear to be changed manually across multiple sheets.
tier2.fix_instruction: Centralise scenario selection to a single input cell and link all scenario-dependent assumptions to it

tier2.label: Core sensitivities produce directionally correct responses
tier2.description: Increasing price should increase revenue and EBITDA. Increasing opex should decrease EBITDA. Increasing capex should decrease IRR. Flag if any sensitivity produces a counter-intuitive result that cannot be explained by model structure.
tier2.fix_instruction: Sensitivity response is counter-intuitive — review the link between the sensitivity input and the affected output

tier2.label: Dedicated checks sheet aggregates all critical tests
tier2.description: A Checks or Audit sheet should aggregate balance sheet balance tests, cash flow reconciliation tests, roll-forward tests, and negative balance tests with clear PASS/FAIL flags. Flag if no such sheet exists or if critical checks are absent.
tier2.fix_instruction: Add a dedicated Checks sheet aggregating all critical model integrity tests with PASS/FAIL flags

tier2.label: Change log exists
tier2.description: A simple change log recording date, editor, description of changes, and version tag should be present — especially after material edits. Flag if no change log exists.
tier2.fix_instruction: Add a change log tab or section on the cover sheet recording date, editor, and description of all material changes

tier2.label: Dashboard presents core KPIs and links to calculations
tier2.description: The Dashboard sheet should present revenue, EBITDA, cash, leverage, coverage, IRR/NPV and key scenario comparisons. All numbers must link to underlying calculations — no pasted values. Flag if Dashboard contains pasted values or missing KPIs.
tier2.fix_instruction: Replace pasted values on Dashboard with live cell references linking to underlying calculation sheets

tier2.label: Cover sheet or README documents model purpose and structure
tier2.description: A cover sheet or README should include model purpose, version, author, date, structure overview, scenario controls, key assumptions, limitations, and how to run checks. Flag if absent or materially incomplete.
tier2.fix_instruction: Add or complete cover sheet with model purpose, version, author, date, key assumptions and limitations
